narrative:
Massillon 6-B (precinct in Stark County) has 998 registered voters, with 62.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
